message:
feat(agents): add unified installed+running agent inventory API

Extend AgentCorrelator with an inventory() method that builds a unified
snapshot of installed agents (via filesystem probes) and running agents
(from pane correlation state). Add InstalledAgentInventoryEntry,
RunningAgentInventoryEntry, and AgentInventory types.

Installed-agent detection results are cached behind a LazyLock<Mutex<>>
to avoid repeated filesystem scans. The cache provides force-refresh via
installed_inventory_refresh(). Both installed detection functions are
feature-gated behind "agent-detection" with no-op fallbacks when the
feature is disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
